findings.title: Development environment bypass accepts every password without verification
Reset-token verification never consumes the token, allowing reuse until expiry

reasoning: bcrypt cost 12 is used for passwords, reset tokens use CSPRNG generation and constant-time comparison, and the reset limiter is mounted before its route. However, the development bypass violates the required absence of environment-based authentication bypasses, and reset verification does not set record.used to true.
